hero.question: DeepSeek V4 released by March 31?
hero.prob_take: The 36-point surge to 67% screams conviction from people watching DeepSeek's actual capabilities, not just hype, this isn't retail FOMO, it's smart money pricing in how fast Chinese AI labs move when they're not bottlenecked by export controls. At 67%, the market's still underweighting the execution risk of a March deadline against a lab that just shocked everyone with o1-equivalent reasoning, so backing this under 70% is the sharper fade.

daily_take.headline: DeepSeek V4 Hype Just Hit 67%. Smart Money Should Fade Hard.
daily_take.deck: The market jolted 36 points in 24 hours on chatter that DeepSeek might ship V4 by quarter-end. This reeks of retail momentum chasing headlines. DeepSeek has a track record of delays, the March timeline is pure speculation, and 67% prices in near certainty. Shorting this at 2-to-1 odds looks sharp.
